inputs.label: Cash & Equivalents
inputs.businessContext: Liquid assets such as bank account balances, cash on hand, and short-term deposits.

businessContext_i18n.en: Liquid assets such as bank account balances, cash on hand, and short-term deposits.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nakit ve nakit benzerleri (banka hesap bakiyeleri, eldeki nakit, kısa vadeli mevduatlar).
businessContext_i18n.de: Liquide Mittel wie Bankguthaben, Bargeld und kurzfristige Einlagen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Actifs liquides tels que les soldes bancaires, l'argent liquide et les dépôts à court terme.
businessContext_i18n.es: Activos líquidos como saldos de cuentas bancarias, efectivo disponible y depósitos a corto plazo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الأصول السائلة مثل أرصدة الحسابات المصرفية والنقدية والودائع قصيرة الأجل.

inputs.label: Investments
inputs.businessContext: Value of stocks, bonds, mutual funds, and other investment securities.

businessContext_i18n.en: Value of stocks, bonds, mutual funds, and other investment securities.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hisse senetleri, tahviller, yatırım fonları ve diğer menkul kıymetlerin değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wert von Aktien, Anleihen, Investmentfonds und anderen Wertpapieren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur des actions, obligations, fonds communs de placement et autres titres de placement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de acciones, bonos, fondos mutuos y otros valores de inversión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة الأسهم والسندات وصناديق الاستثمار المشتركة والأوراق المالية الأخرى.

inputs.label: Real Estate
inputs.businessContext: Market value of owned real estate properties including primary residence.

businessContext_i18n.en: Market value of owned real estate properties including primary residence.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sahip olunan gayrimenkullerin (birincil konut dahil) piyasa değeri.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur marchande des biens immobiliers possédés, y compris la résidence principale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de mercado de propiedades inmobiliarias propias, incluida la residencia principal.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة السوقية للعقارات المملوكة بما في ذلك المسكن الأساسي.

inputs.label: Personal Property
inputs.businessContext: Value of vehicles, jewelry, art, and other high-value personal belongings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Value of vehicles, jewelry, art, and other high-value personal belongings.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Araçlar, mücevherler, sanat eserleri ve diğer yüksek değerli kişisel eşyaların değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wert von Fahrzeugen, Schmuck, Kunst und anderen hochwertigen persönlichen Gegenständen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur des véhicules, bijoux, œuvres d'art et autres biens personnels de grande valeur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor de vehículos, joyas, arte y otros objetos personales de alto valor.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة المركبات والمجوهرات والفنون والممتلكات الشخصية الأخرى عالية القيمة.

inputs.label: Other Assets
inputs.businessContext: Any other assets not categorized above (e.g., business ownership, intellectual property).

businessContext_i18n.en: Any other assets not categorized above (e.g., business ownership, intellectual property).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yukarıda kategorize edilmeyen diğer tüm varlıklar (ör. işletme sahipliği, fikri mülkiyet).
businessContext_i18n.de: Alle anderen nicht oben kategorisierten Vermögenswerte (z. B. Unternehmensbeteiligungen, geistiges Eigentum).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tout autre actif non catégorisé ci-dessus (par exemple, propriété d'entreprise, propriété intellectuelle).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cualquier otro activo no categorizado anteriormente (por ejemplo, propiedad de negocio, propiedad intelectual).
businessContext_i18n.ar: أي أصول أخرى غير مصنفة أعلاه (مثل ملكية الأعمال والملكية الفكرية).

inputs.label: Current Debt
inputs.businessContext: Short-term liabilities due within one year (credit cards, short-term loans).

businessContext_i18n.en: Short-term liabilities due within one year (credit cards, short-term loans).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir yıl içinde vadesi dolan kısa vadeli yükümlülükler (kredi kartları, kısa vadeli krediler).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kurzfristige Verbindlichkeiten mit Fälligkeit innerhalb eines Jahres (Kreditkarten, kurzfristige Darlehen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Passifs à court terme exigibles dans un an (cartes de crédit, prêts à court terme).
businessContext_i18n.es: Pasivos a corto plazo con vencimiento dentro de un año (tarjetas de crédito, préstamos a corto plazo).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الالتزامات قصيرة الأجل المستحقة خلال عام (بطاقات الائتمان، القروض قصيرة الأجل).

inputs.label: Long-Term Debt
inputs.businessContext: Liabilities with maturity beyond one year (mortgages, student loans, car loans).

businessContext_i18n.en: Liabilities with maturity beyond one year (mortgages, student loans, car loans).
businessContext_i18n.es: Pasivos con vencimiento superior a un año (hipotecas, préstamos estudiantiles, préstamos para automóvil).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الالتزامات ذات أجل استحقاق يتجاوز عامًا (الرهون العقارية، قروض الطلاب، قروض السيارات).

inputs.label: Other Debt
inputs.businessContext: Any other outstanding obligations not included above (e.g., tax liabilities, medical bills).

label_i18n.tr: Vadesi bir yıldan uzun olan yükümlülükler (ipotekler, öğrenci kredileri, araba kredileri).
label_i18n.de: Verbindlichkeiten mit einer Laufzeit von mehr als einem Jahr (Hypotheken, Studienkredite, Autokredite).

businessContext_i18n.en: Any other outstanding obligations not included above (e.g., tax liabilities, medical bills).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Toute autre obligation en cours non incluse ci-dessus (par exemple, dettes fiscales, factures médicales).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cualquier otra obligación pendiente no incluida anteriormente (por ejemplo, obligaciones fiscales, facturas médicas).
businessContext_i18n.ar: أي التزامات أخرى مستحقة غير مدرجة أعلاه (مثل الالتزامات الضريبية، الفواتير الطبية).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
